concept.title: Architecture Overview
concept.shortdesc: Understand the deterministic pipeline and the Patterns to Actions to Handlers model.

conbody.p: The architecture separates observation, intent, and mutation so you debug by reading artifacts instead of reverse-engineering side effects.

image.alt: Discovery to Pattern Recognition to Planning to Execution to Reporting.
Patterns describe conditions, actions declare intent, handlers apply changes.
Package input through discovery, normalize, plan, execute dry-run, and execute apply.

ul.li: Normalize enforces the planning input contract.
Execute dispatches actions to handlers and records outcomes.

section.title: Debugging approach
section.p: When a run fails, inspect artifacts in sequence. If plan.json intent is wrong, adjust discovery interpretation or planning logic. If plan intent is correct but outcomes fail, inspect handler execution paths and policy enforcement.
